title: WebSocket channel leak fix in _doConnect
description: _doConnect() now calls _channel?.sink.close() before replacing _channel, both at the start (close previous handle) and in the catch block (close partially-opened handle). Without this, each failed connect attempt would leak the underlying TCP handle. The fix is correct and the comments explaining the two cases are accurate. A future contributor might think the null check makes the first close redundant (because _channel starts null), but on reconnect _channel holds the previous session's handle.
